'''sashoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qisas|qisas]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-sh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qisas|qisas]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sashoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæsheheth|sæsheheth]] || [[word:sæshehej|sæshehej]] || [[word:sæshehesh|sæshehesh]] || [[word:sæshehe|sæshehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sashoshohoth|sashoshohoth]] || [[word:sashoshohoj|sashoshohoj]] || [[word:sashoshohosh|sashoshohosh]] || [[word:sashoshoho|sashoshoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sashohoth|sashohoth]] || [[word:sashohoj|sashohoj]] || [[word:sashohosh|sashohosh]] || [[word:sashoho|sashoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sashofhoth|sashofhoth]] || [[word:sashofhoj|sashofhoj]] || [[word:sashofhosh|sashofhosh]] || [[word:sashofhof|sashofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sashohotho|sashohotho]] || [[word:sashohojo|sashohojo]] || [[word:sashohosho|sashohosho]] || [[word:sashohoko|sashohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sashohoth|sashohoth]] || [[word:sashohoj|sashohoj]] || [[word:sashohosh|sashohosh]] || [[word:sashoho|sashoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sashohothol|sashohothol]] || [[word:sashohojol|sashohojol]] || [[word:sashohoshol|sashohoshol]] || [[word:sashohokol|sashohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sashohothotho|sashohothotho]] || [[word:sashohojojo|sashohojojo]] || [[word:sashohoshosho|sashohoshosho]] || [[word:sashohoko|sashohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sashohothon|sashohothon]] || [[word:sashohojon|sashohojon]] || [[word:sashohoshon|sashohoshon]] || [[word:sashohokon|sashohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sashohothoro|sashohothoro]] || [[word:sashohojoro|sashohojoro]] || [[word:sashohoshoro|sashohoshoro]] || [[word:sashohokoro|sashohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
